description: This file implements an in-memory orchestration service for managing build workflows, document extraction, normalization, persona generation, and finalization in a persona-building application. It provides functions to start orchestrations, link documents, run full workflows, and handle persona drafts and finalization, relying on various external repositories and services.

methods.name: _isDocumentMutationLocked
methods.description: Checks if document mutations are locked based on validation state.

methods.name: _assertDocumentsMutable
methods.description: Throws error if document mutations are not allowed for given build/persona.

methods.name: _bestEffortPersistBuildDocumentsLink
methods.description: Attempts to persist build-document links; no-op if unsupported.

methods.name: _loadLatestExtractedTextForDocuments
methods.description: Loads latest extracted text rows for given document IDs.

methods.name: _getOrNull
methods.description: Retrieves orchestration record for a buildId or null.

methods.name: _ensure
methods.description: Creates or retrieves existing orchestration record for a buildId.

methods.name: _touch
methods.description: Updates orchestration record with new data and timestamp.

methods.name: _concatTexts
methods.description: Concatenates extracted text rows into a single normalized string with category headers.

methods.name: startOrchestration
methods.description: Creates a build and initializes orchestration record, linking documents if provided.

methods.name: linkUploadToBuild
methods.description: Links an upload batch and documents to a build orchestration, enforcing validation lock.

methods.name: extractAndNormalizeForBuild
methods.description: Loads latest extracted text, normalizes, and updates orchestration state.

methods.name: generatePersonaDraftForBuild
methods.description: Generates a persona draft using external personaService, with heuristic name/role extraction.

methods.name: finalizePersonaForBuild
methods.description: Finalizes and saves persona for a build, optionally creating a version.

methods.name: runAllOrchestration
methods.description: Runs full end-to-end workflow: start build, link docs, extract, generate draft, finalize.
